audit_metadata.agent: AGENT #3: AUDITORIA COMPLETA DE KB E INTEGRAÇÃO

findings.issue: KB vazia apesar de uploads existentes
findings.description: kb-documents.json está vazio ([]) mas existem 9 PDFs em data/uploads/
findings.impact: Nenhum documento aparece no chat, KB não funcional

upload_endpoints.behavior: Saves file to uploads/ directory only
upload_endpoints.kb_integration: NO - Does not add to kb-documents.json

upload_endpoints.kb_integration: NO - Does not add to kb-documents.json

upload_endpoints.behavior: Handles chunked uploads, finalizes to uploads/ directory
upload_endpoints.kb_integration: NO - Does not add to kb-documents.json

upload_endpoints.behavior: Processes with 91 tools, generates structured docs
upload_endpoints.kb_integration: PARTIAL - Copies to KB but uses old EXTRACTOR_CONFIG path
upload_endpoints.status: LEGACY - May not work with current architecture

upload_endpoints.behavior: Merges PDFs and adds to KB via kbCache.add()

findings.issue: Upload endpoints não adicionam documentos ao KB
findings.description: POST /api/upload e /api/upload/base64 apenas salvam arquivos em uploads/ mas não registram em kb-documents.json
findings.impact: Documentos enviados não aparecem no chat consultar_kb tool
findings.expected_behavior: Após salvar arquivo, deve chamar kbCache.add() com metadata do documento
findings.actual_behavior: Apenas retorna fileInfo ao frontend, não registra no KB

findings.issue: Fluxo de upload desconectado do KB
findings.description: Frontend faz upload mas documentos não entram automaticamente na KB
findings.root_cause: Upload endpoints são genéricos (para chat/dashboard) e não têm integração com KB
findings.solution: Adicionar step após upload para registrar documento no kbCache

chat_tools.description: Consulta documentos na KB do usuário por query
chat_tools.text_loading: Returns full extractedText from KB entry

chat_tools.description: Analisa documentos da KB gerando fichamentos técnicos

kb_analyze_endpoint.description: Direct endpoint for V2 analysis of KB documents
features: PDF detection and OCR for scanned docs

merge_first_analysis.description: Detects merged documents and extracts volumes in parallel
merge_first_analysis.benefit: 1 analysis cost instead of N volumes × analysis cost

findings.issue: Documentos não aparecem no chat após upload
findings.description: Chat tools (consultar_kb, analisar_documento_kb) funcionam corretamente mas KB está vazia
findings.root_cause: Upload não adiciona documentos ao KB (veja upload_to_kb_integration)
findings.impact: Usuários fazem upload mas não conseguem consultar/analisar

findings.issue: consultar_kb pode retornar texto muito grande
findings.description: Tool retorna extractedText completo sem limitação (linha 916-918)
findings.impact: Para documentos grandes (>1MB), pode exceder context window
findings.mitigation: Sonnet 4.5 suporta 200k tokens output, geralmente OK
findings.recommendation: Adicionar truncation opcional para documentos muito grandes

features: Saves individual volumes for merge-first analysis
Registers merged document in KB via kbCache.add()

merge_first_integration.description: Merged documents include metadata.sourceVolumes with paths
merge_first_integration.kb_analyze_support: kb-analyze-v2.js detects isMergedDocument and processes volumes in parallel
merge_first_integration.cost_optimization: Extraction in parallel (free via pdf-parse), single analysis (1× cost)

findings.description: Único endpoint de upload que registra corretamente no KB
findings.recommendation: Usar como modelo para corrigir outros endpoints de upload

architecture.step1: Nova Micro extracts full text ($0.052 per 300 pages)
architecture.step2: Save extracted text to KB as intermediate document
architecture.step3: Claude analyzes complete text ($4.50 per 300 pages)

actions: Adds to kb-documents.json via fs.writeFileSync + kbCache.add()

technical_files_saving.kb_registration: Each file added to KB via kbCache.add()

findings.issue: Document Processor V2 está bem implementado
findings.description: Arquitetura sólida com economia de custo e integração correta com KB

issue_1.title: Upload → KB Integration Broken
issue_1.description: Primary upload endpoints do not register documents in KB
issue_1.impact: Users upload files but cannot query them in chat
issue_1.solution: Add kbCache.add() call after file save in each endpoint

issue_2.title: KB Empty Despite Existing Uploads
issue_2.description: 9 PDFs exist in uploads/ but kb-documents.json is empty
issue_2.solution: Either rebuild KB from uploads/ or delete orphaned files

issue_3.title: No Automatic KB Population on Upload
issue_3.description: Upload flow ends at file save, missing KB registration step
issue_3.user_flow: Upload → Save to disk → [MISSING: Add to KB] → Return fileInfo
issue_3.expected_flow: Upload → Save to disk → Add to KB → Return fileInfo
issue_3.impact: Documents are uploaded but invisible to chat system

current_state.chat_query: Chat → consultar_kb → kbCache.getAll() → Filter by userId → Return docs
current_state.chat_analyze: Chat → analisar_documento_kb → Find in KB → processComplete() → Save files to KB

desired_state.upload_any: Frontend → POST /api/upload* → uploads/ → ✅ KB (kbCache.add) → Return with KB ID
desired_state.chat_integration: All uploads automatically visible in chat via consultar_kb
desired_state.analysis_on_demand: User can analyze any uploaded document via analisar_documento_kb

priority_1_critical.action: Fix upload endpoints to register in KB
priority_1_critical.implementation: After saving file, add: kbCache.add({ id, name, path, size, type, userId, uploadedAt, metadata })

priority_1_critical.description: Scan uploads/ directory and register all PDFs in kb-documents.json
options: Manual: POST /api/kb/emergency/files to list, then add each
Automated: Create migration script to scan and register all files

priority_2_high.action: Add KB registration to chunked upload finalize
priority_2_high.description: When chunked upload completes, automatically add to KB
priority_2_high.code_change: After successful finalize, call kbCache.add() with file metadata

priority_2_high.action: Deprecate /api/upload-documents in favor of new flow
priority_2_high.description: Legacy endpoint uses old EXTRACTOR_CONFIG, replace with new upload + analyze flow
priority_2_high.migration_path: Upload with POST /api/upload → Analyze with POST /api/kb/analyze-v2

priority_3_medium.description: GET /api/kb/status to show KB stats (total docs, by type, by user, etc)
For very large documents, optionally return summary or first N chars

priority_4_low.description: Already exists in kb-merge-volumes.js:495 but not documented
priority_4_low.note: POST /api/kb/cleanup allows filtering and removing documents

rebuild_kb_script.description: Script to rebuild KB from uploads directory

test_1.name: Upload via POST /api/upload
steps: Check if document appears in kb-documents.json
Test consultar_kb in chat to find the document
test_1.expected: Document should be queryable immediately after upload

test_2.name: Upload via chunked (large file)
steps: Upload large PDF (>100MB) via chunked upload
test_2.expected: Large file should be in KB and analyzable

test_3.name: Volume merge and analysis
test_3.expected: Merged document analyzed efficiently with single cost

test_4.name: KB persistence across restarts
steps: Upload document and add to KB
Check if kbCache loads document from disk
Verify document still queryable in chat
test_4.expected: KB survives restart via kb-documents.json persistence

conclusion.overall_assessment: KB infrastructure is well-designed but upload integration is broken
key_findings: Document Processor V2 is excellent - sophisticated, cost-optimized, feature-rich
KB Cache implementation is solid - atomic writes, cluster-safe, high performance
Volume merger works perfectly - should be template for other uploads
Chat tools work correctly - problem is empty KB, not the tools
Upload endpoints are broken - missing KB registration step
conclusion.root_cause: Upload endpoints were designed as generic file storage (for chat attachments) without KB integration
conclusion.impact: Users can upload files but cannot query or analyze them - KB appears empty
conclusion.fix_complexity: LOW - Just add kbCache.add() calls to upload endpoints
conclusion.business_impact: HIGH - Core feature (document analysis) is unusable due to this bug

next_steps: 4. Create rebuild script to register existing uploads (30 min)
5. Test all upload methods with KB integration (1 hour)
6. Document upload → KB flow for future developers (30 min)
7. Add monitoring/alerts for KB health (optional, 1 hour)
